title: rubus × subhorridus
intro: Rubus × subhorridus, also known as the hybrid blackberry thimbleberry, is a cross between the American blackberry (Rubus allegheniensis) and the thimbleberry (Rubus parviflorus). This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals. The health benefits of Rubus × subhorridus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive well-being due to its rich fiber and anthocyanin content. Herbal preparations of Rubus × subhorridus can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
